layout.footer_disclaimer_body: this tool uses visual fingerprint image similarity comparison and serves as a first orientative filter only — it is not a certified forensic biometric system. All matches must be confirmed with authorities, the Red Cross, or competent forensic organizations before taking action.
layout.footer_humanitarian: This is a humanitarian aid service, free and non-profit.
layout.footer_credits: Made by Alejandro Trujillo and Gabriel Vega

home.title: Reencuentro
home.subtitle: Fingerprint registration and comparison - Venezuela
home.hero: Every fingerprint <accent>is a life</accent> looking for someone
home.hero_body: Biometric identification system for missing or unidentified persons in Venezuela.
home.familiares_register_title: If you are a family member, click here
home.familiares_register_body: If you are looking for a family member and have a document showing their LEGIBLE fingerprint, enter here and follow the steps below.
home.familiares_search_title: Search here for your already-registered family member — click here
home.familiares_search_body: Search a record by ID document, email, or phone number.
home.colaboradores_title: Help us register fingerprints everywhere — click here
home.colaboradores_body: Help us register fingerprints of deceased persons and injured or missing people by entering this option and following the steps below.

familiares_nuevo.title: Upload your family member's information
familiares_nuevo.example_body: The photo you are about to upload must look very similar to the example. Use the right thumb fingerprint, the same one that appears on the national ID card. Take a well-focused photo with good lighting, as shown in the example.
familiares_nuevo.example_body2: Do not upload a photo of the full document — only the fingerprint.
familiares_nuevo.subir_huella_desc: Take a photo with the camera or select an existing photo.
familiares_nuevo.label_direccion: Address where the person was last seen
familiares_nuevo.label_nombre_familiar: Name of the family member searching
familiares_nuevo.label_telefono_familiar: Phone number of the family member searching
familiares_nuevo.error_sin_huella: Please upload or take a photo of the fingerprint before saving.
familiares_nuevo.error_servidor: Could not connect to the server.

base_datos.title: Database
base_datos.placeholder: Search by name, document, email, or phone...
base_datos.min_chars: Type at least {min} characters to search.
base_datos.sin_resultados: No records found with that information.
base_datos.error_servidor: Could not connect to the server.

candidatos_familiar.subtitle_confirm: Visually compare the registered fingerprint with the fingerprints scanned in the field.
candidatos_familiar.subtitle_readonly: These are the fingerprints registered so far. Visually compare with {nombre}'s fingerprint. To confirm a match, search for it in "View database".
candidatos_familiar.spinner: Searching for matches... this may take a moment if there are many records.
candidatos_familiar.sin_huellas: No fingerprints registered yet. If someone scans a fingerprint in the future, it will automatically be compared with this record.
candidatos_familiar.ver_mapa: View scan location on Google Maps
candidatos_familiar.confirmar_btn: This is the person — confirm match
candidatos_familiar.coincidencia_subtitle: Contact the family to follow up:

candidatos_huella.title: Possible matches
candidatos_huella.subtitle: Visually compare the scanned fingerprint with registered family members. The percentage is only an orientative filter. To confirm a match, search for it in "View database".
candidatos_huella.spinner: Searching for matches... this may take a moment if there are many records.
candidatos_huella.sin_familiares: No family members registered yet for comparison. This fingerprint is saved and will automatically be compared when someone registers a family member.

escanear.title: Scan fingerprints
escanear.subtitle: Take or upload the fingerprint of a missing or deceased person to search for matches. You can upload the photo first and fill in the details later.
escanear.subir_huella_desc: Select an existing photo or scan.
escanear.etiqueta_label: Tag photo on wrist or ankle (optional)
escanear.etiqueta_subir_desc: Optional — photo of the tag on wrist or ankle
escanear.label_direccion: Address where the person was found (optional)
escanear.observaciones_placeholder: E.g.: exact location, condition, distinguishing marks...
escanear.error_sin_huella: Please take or upload a photo of the fingerprint before saving.
escanear.error_servidor: Could not connect to the server.
escanear.error_generico: An error occurred while processing the fingerprint.

guia.title: Collaborator guide
guia.gracias: Dear Collaborator, thank you in advance for helping us with this work
guia.materiales: To complete this process you need an ink pad or a black permanent marker and a blank sheet of paper.
guia.paso1: Clean the RIGHT THUMB of the unknown person.
guia.paso2: Apply ink with the ink pad or marker to the clean finger (note: do not use too much ink so the fingerprint stays legible).
guia.paso3: Press the finger gently onto the paper surface, as shown in the example below.
guia.paso4: Take a photo of the fingerprint with your phone camera. See the example below.

confirmar_match.label_direccion: Current address of the missing person
confirmar_match.estado_label: Status of the missing person (alive or deceased)
confirmar_match.error_servidor: Could not connect to the server.

galeria.title: Unidentified fingerprints
galeria.subtitle: Fingerprints scanned in the field that do not yet have a confirmed match. If you recognize someone, register them as a family member to compare.
